title: Anthropic rents SpaceX?
summary: Anthropic partnered with SpaceX to access the Colossus GPU cluster, addressing a competitive weakness in vertical integration compared to other frontier AI labs. The video argues that control over chips, energy, and datacenters is becoming more important than model benchmarks in the AI race.
